message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User1
participant "Website" as Website
participant "Server" as Server
participant "phonebook" as Phonebook

User1 ..> Website : select contact
User1 ..> Website : click button "DeleteContact"

Website ..> Server : deleteContact()
Server ..> Phonebook : Update()
Server ..> Website : ok
Website ..> Website : ok

Website ..> Server : getAllContacts()
Server ..> Phonebook : findAll()
Server ..> Website : ContactsList
Website ..> Website : ContactsList

@enduml
